## Summary

- What changed?
- Why did it change?

## User-Facing Impact

- What behavior changed for users, operators, or contributors?

## Validation

- Commands run:

## Docs

- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] Changelog updated if this should appear in release notes

## Risk

- What could regress?

## Licensing

- [ ] No licensing impact
- [ ] Licensing impact called out in the PR description
